name: PUBSEC /Zenless Zone Zero
description:
"If you encounter any trouble, please contact New Eridu Public Security."

The Criminal Investigation Special Response Team is a team within New Eridu Public Security.

The Criminal Investigation Special Response Team is a division of PubSec operating out of the Janus Quarter (namely, in its Lumina Square branch). They are tasked with the investigation of criminal activity, performing raids and in-Hollow operations. Officer Zhu Yuan is the current captain of the team, an exceptional member of the force with no unresolved cases. The Criminal Investigation team is shown to hire external assistance, most notably Jane Doe, an enigmatic criminal behaviour specialist who serves as both a consultant and an undercover agent for them.
creator: Cdzr 2
